description_long: This is a large L-shaped counter, commonly found in urban environments such as reception areas, offices, or public service points. The counter features two main sections: a longer main desk with three drawers on one side and a shorter perpendicular extension with two drawers. The surfaces are flat and spacious, suitable for writing, placing equipment, or interacting with the public. The drawers are integrated into the supporting legs, providing storage and organizational functionality. The overall design is utilitarian, with clean lines and a monochromatic finish, likely made from laminated wood or engineered material. The counter is robust and designed to support significant weight on its surfaces.
description: A large, L-shaped counter with integrated drawers and a flat, spacious surface, finished in a monochromatic color. Designed for urban reception or office use, it offers ample workspace and storage.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the L-shape, both drawer units, and the full extent of the counter surfaces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid panel construction and the overhanging main counter section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long main desk and the perpendicular extension, with drawer units partially visible.
description_view_3: Front view showing the three-drawer and two-drawer units, as well as the open leg space beneath the counter.
